title: Sunset Sketch Quest
description: Find a quiet spot near a park or balcony and sketch the sunset scene with one extra fantasy detail.

title: Rooftop Relay
description: Organize a short relay race with two friends using three fun checkpoints in your neighborhood.

title: Mystery Snack Hunt
description: Create a mini scavenger hunt that leads your group to a secret snack spot and reveals a surprise treat.

title: Night Sky Campfire
description: Plan a safe evening campfire with story prompts, marshmallows, and a stargazing challenge.

title: Legendary Challenge Run
description: Build a custom adventure obstacle course and finish it with a group photo at the final trophy spot.
